purpose: Separate distributable route knowledge from private browser-backed evidence.
public_asset_rules: No credentials, cookies, browser profiles, personal institution identity, or local paths.
Publisher matrices are planning summaries, not fresh entitlement verdicts.
Institution entries must be public route knowledge or explicit placeholders with provenance-safe notes.
private_assets: run manifests containing local paths or institution names
private_storage_rule: Keep an external index that references original run evidence; do not copy PDFs, cookies, or browser profiles into the index or public repository.
publication_rule: Only publish a separately reviewed, anonymized summary after public-audit passes.
